news.headline: France mourns intellectual 'grandfather', sociologist and philosopher Edgar Morin
news.summary: France is mourning the loss of Edgar Morin. The country's favorite intellectual has passed away at the age of 104. President Emmanuel Macron paid him tribute – calling Morin "humanism personified" – and offered his loved ones the condolences of the nation. FRANCE 24's Caroline Baum takes a look back

news.headline: How Curry Shops Got Caught in Japan’s Immigration Crackdown
news.summary: Under Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, new visa rules are forcing some foreign business owners, who have put down roots in Japan, to leave.
